creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Created attachment 226788
lsblk.diff

Hi,

I have fixed several lsblk(8) bugs.

Please update the port if you have the time.

Here is the changelog if needed:

- Fix label display.
- Improve FUSE filesystems display.
- Fix whole disks display.
- Make more space for labels display in output.

I attached the diff(1) output according to this documentation:
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/upgrading/

Hope that helps.

Regards.
